name: GOLFTEC Tualatin
about: GOLFTEC Tualatin is a golf training studio that uses technology-driven instruction to help golfers improve their game. The facility features advanced swing analysis tools including OPTIMOTION motion capture technology and high-speed video feedback to provide detailed insights into a golfer's swing mechanics. Lessons are structured around personalized improvement plans developed by PGA-certified coaches. The venue offers both individual instruction sessions and practice memberships that provide access to the training bays equipped with launch monitors for independent practice.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and video analysis
Personalized lesson plans from PGA-certified coaches
Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION for swing tracking
Practice memberships for independent training bay access
Custom club fitting services with shaft optimization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides equipment for use during lessons and practice sessions. For club fitting services, you can bring your current clubs or use the available demo equipment to find the perfect fit.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned. It appears you cannot bring outside food or drinks to the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to complete 18 holes in their simulator bays. Lesson durations and practice sessions are typically structured by the coach or membership plan.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly? Are there junior programs available?
faq.answer: The website mentions that junior golfers are a target audience and that their technology helps juniors see and understand their progress. Specific kid-friendly amenities or junior programs are not detailed, but the coaching services are available to golfers of all ages and skill levels.
